topWPAPlays.description: Esmerlyn Valdez hits a grand slam (9) to right field. Henry Davis scores. Jake Mangum scores. Brandon Lowe scores.

William Contreras reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Jared Triolo. Christian Yelich to 3rd. Brice Turang to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Jared Triolo.

Christian Yelich walks.
